taskDescription: Arrange the nerve supply of the tongue from anterior to posterior in the correct anatomical order.
paragraphs: Anterior 2/3 general sensation: lingual nerve (branch of CN V3, mandibular division of trigeminal).
Anterior 2/3 taste sensation: chorda tympani nerve (branch of CN VII, facial nerve) carried by the lingual nerve.
Posterior 1/3 both general sensation and taste: glossopharyngeal nerve (CN IX).
Root of tongue and epiglottis: internal laryngeal branch of the vagus nerve (CN X).
All motor supply (intrinsic and extrinsic muscles except palatoglossus): hypoglossal nerve (CN XII).
